attachments.fallback: How to Export Emails from PowerMail to Outlook? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: You can easily do it using the MacSonik MBOX Converter Tool. Since PowerMail saves its mailbox data in MBOX format, which Outlook doesn’t support directly, this tool provides a quick solution. Just launch the MacSonik MBOX Converter, upload your PowerMail MBOX files, and choose PST as the saving option.
